mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_MEMBER A WHERE 1=1
AND A.${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY A.ADD_DATE ASC

SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.MEMBER_NAME, A.MEMBER_PW, A.BIRTH_DAY, A.EMAIL, A.ZIPCODE, A.ADDRESS1, A.ADDRESS2, A.PHONE, A.CELL_PHONE, A.SMS_SERVICE_YN, A.EMAIL_SERVICE_YN, A.ADD_IP, A.ADD_DATE, A.PW_CHANGE_DATE, A.LAST_LOGIN, A.LINK_MEMBER_YN, 'CMS' AS LOGINTYPE, A.ADMIN_YN FROM CMS_MEMBER A WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_MEMBER ( HOMEPAGE_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, BIRTH_DAY, EMAIL, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, PHONE, CELL_PHONE, SMS_SERVICE_YN, EMAIL_SERVICE_YN, ADD_IP, ADD_DATE, PW_CHANGE_DATE, LAST_LOGIN, LINK_MEMBER_YN, ADMIN_YN ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{member_id}, #{member_name}, #{member_pw}, #{birth_day}, #{email}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{phone}, #{cell_phone}, #{sms_service_yn}, #{email_service_yn}, #{add_ip}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{link_member_yn}, #{admin_yn} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_MEMBER a,(SELECT MEMBER_ID, MIN(TO_NUMBER(AUTH_ID)) AS AUTH_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER_AUTH GROUP BY MEMBER_ID) b WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND b.AUTH_ID = #{auth_id}
mapper.insert: insert into INTEGRATION_MEMBER (ORIGIN_MEMBER_ID, CHANGE_MEMBER_ID, ORIGIN_SEQ_NO, CHANGE_SEQ_NO, ADD_DATE) values (#{integrationIdList}, #{integrationId}, #{integrationSeqNoList}, #{integrationSeqNo}, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DLS_MEMBER WHERE dls_id = #{dls_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(dls_member_idx),0)+1 FROM DLS_MEMBER
INSERT INTO DLS_MEMBER ( dls_member_idx, dls_id, lib_id, web_id, user_name, user_ip, add_date ) VALUES ( #{dls_member_idx}, #{dls_id}, #{lib_id}, #{web_id}, #{user_name}, #{user_ip}, SYSDATE )

SELECT NVL(MAX(idx),0)+1 FROM CHANGE_NAME_HISTORY
INSERT INTO CHANGE_NAME_HISTORY ( idx, ilus_user_id, ilus_user_seq, ilus_web_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{idx}, #{user_id}, #{seq_no}, #{web_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DECODE(module_type, 'CMS', 'CMS', NVL(A.site_id, 'CMS')) || '_' || a.menu_idx || '_' || a.module_idx || '_' || a.auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(module_type, 'CMS', 'CMS', NVL(A.site_id, 'CMS')) || '_' || a.menu_idx || '_' || a.module_idx || '_' || a.auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_RELATION B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.relation_member_group_idx AND B.member_group_idx in ( SELECT member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD WHERE member_id = #{member_id}) UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(module_type, 'CMS', 'CMS', NVL(A.site_id, 'CMS')) || '_' || a.menu_idx || '_' || a.module_idx || '_' || a.auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_RELATION B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.relation_member_group_idx in ( SELECT member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD WHERE member_id = #{member_id})

SELECT SITE_ID || '_A' FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.admin_group_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT SITE_ID || '_A' FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_RELATION B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.relation_member_group_idx AND B.member_group_idx in ( SELECT member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD WHERE member_id = #{member_id}) AND A.admin_group_yn = 'Y'

SELECT A.*, ( select listagg((case when site_id != 'CMS' THEN (SELECT homepage_alias from cms_homepage where homepage_id = site_id) || ' - ' || member_group_name else 'CMS - ' || member_group_name end), ', ') within group (order by member_group_name) as search_auth from wb_member_group where member_group_idx in ( select member_group_idx from wb_member_group_subord where member_id = A.member_id ) ) as search_auth FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT DISTINCT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.MEMBER_NAME, A.PHONE, A.LINK_MEMBER_YN, A.add_date FROM CMS_MEMBER A
, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD b, WB_MEMBER_GROUP c WHERE a.member_id = b.member_id AND b.member_group_idx = c.member_group_idx AND c.site_id = #{homepage_id}
AND A.${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND A.${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY A.ADD_DATE DESC ${pagingBottom} ) A

SELECT DISTINCT A.* FROM CMS_MEMBER A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH C WHERE a.member_id = b.member_id AND b.member_group_idx = c.member_group_idx AND c.module_idx = #{manage_idx} AND c.auth_code_id = 'MBA' AND c.module_type = 'SITE'

SELECT A.site_id || '_' || a.menu_idx || '_' || a.module_idx || '_' || a.auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.guest_group_yn ='Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO MEMBER_LAST_LOGIN a USING dual ON (a.seq_no = #{seq_no}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.last_login = SYSDATE, a.web_id = #{web_id}, a.last_login_ip = #{last_login_ip} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( seq_no, last_login, last_login_ip, web_id ) VALUES ( #{seq_no}, SYSDATE, #{last_login_ip}, #{web_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_GROUP_IDX FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE SITE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_GROUP_NAME LIKE '%임시관리자%'
SELECT tx_id, use_inc_id, seq, jnt_svc_id, jnt_svc_nm, name, birthday, result FROM TB_PISC01 WHERE tx_id = #{tx_id}
SELECT DISTINCT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.MEMBER_NAME, A.PHONE, A.LINK_MEMBER_YN, A.add_date, A.last_login FROM CMS_MEMBER A ORDER BY A.MEMBER_ID
